title: Totem of Undying Mikasa
description: This pack gives your Totem of Undying a unique pixel-art style makeover inspired by Mikasa.
body:
![totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88156c4d07aa4388bdcef7475e82ba395511843a_0.webp)

# **Attack on Titan Totem – Mikasa Ackerman**

Carry the strength of Mikasa Ackerman in every fight!
This pack gives your Totem of Undying a unique pixel-art style makeover inspired by Mikasa, humanity’s fiercest soldier. Every revival will feel like you’re being protected by the spirit of Mikasa herself.

### Currently Available:

- **Eren** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-eren-attack-on-titan)
- **Mikasa** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-mikasa-attack-on-titan)
- **Armin** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-armin-attack-on-titan)

## ✨ Features:

- Custom pixel-art **Totem of Undying** as **Mikasa**
- Works seamlessly with vanilla textures
- Perfect for anime Minecraft setups or roleplay servers

## 🔧 Installation:

- Download the .zip file.
- Move it into your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable in-game.
- Rename Totem of Undying → Mikasa (for CIT). (Soon Available)
